moves.description: Gives the opponent’s side the Spikes status.

moves.name: Axe Kick
moves.description:
Has a 30% chance of confusing the target. If this move misses
or fails, the user takes damage equal to 1/2 of its max HP.

moves.name: Last Respects
moves.description:
This move’s power is increased by 50 for each time that a
Pokémon in the user’s party has fainted.

moves.name: Lumina Crash
moves.description: Lowers the target’s Sp. Def stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Spicy Extract
moves.description:
Lowers the target’s Defense stat by 2 stages and boosts its
Attack stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Population Bomb
moves.description:
The user attacks 1 to 10 times in a row. The attack ends if the
user misses.

moves.name: Ice Spinner
moves.description: Removes any terrain.

moves.name: Revival Blessing
moves.description:
Revives a Pokémon in the user’s party that has fainted and
restores 1/2 of that Pokémon’s max HP.

moves.name: Salt Cure
moves.description: Gives the target the Salt Cured status.

moves.name: Mortal Spin
moves.description:
Removes the Bound and Leech Seeded statuses from the user
and removes the Sticky Web, Stealth Rock, Spikes, and Toxic
Spikes statuses from the user’s side. Poisons targets.

moves.name: Kowtow Cleave
moves.description: This move never misses.

moves.name: Flower Trick
moves.description: This move never misses and is always a critical hit.

moves.name: Torch Song
moves.description: Boosts the user’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Aqua Step
moves.description: Boosts the user’s Speed stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Raging Bull
moves.description:
Removes the Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil statuses on
the target’s side. This move’s type depends on the user’s form.

moves.name: Make It Rain
moves.description: Lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat by 2 stages.

moves.name: Shed Tail
moves.description:
The user loses 1/2 of its max HP to create a substitute, then
switches out of battle to be replaced by another party
Pokémon. The substitute will be hit by moves instead of that
Pokémon, and it will vanish when it takes damage equal to 1/4
of the user’s max HP.

moves.name: Chilly Reception
moves.description:
Summons snow for 5 turns. The user switches out of battle to be
replaced by another party Pokémon.

moves.name: Tidy Up
moves.description:
Removes the Sticky Web, Stealth Rock, Substitute, Spikes, and
Toxic Spikes statuses from the entire field. Boosts the user’s
Attack and Speed stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Snowscape
moves.description: Summons snow for 5 turns.

moves.name: Pounce
moves.description: Lowers the target’s Speed stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Trailblaze
moves.description: Boosts the user’s Speed stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Chilling Water
moves.description: Lowers the target’s Attack stat by 1 stage.

moves.name: Twin Beam
moves.description: The user attacks twice in a row.

moves.name: Rage Fist
moves.description:
This move’s power is increased by 50 each time the user takes
damage from a move, up to a maximum power of 350. If the
user switches out of battle, the move’s power returns to its
usual value.

moves.name: Armor Cannon
moves.description: Lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.

moves.name: Bitter Blade
moves.description:
The user’s HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by
this move.

moves.name: Double Shock
moves.description:
The user loses the Electric type. This move fails unless it is used
by an Electric type.

moves.name: Gigaton Hammer
moves.description: This move can’t be used twice in a row.

moves.name: Comeuppance
moves.description:
The user retaliates to deal 150% of the damage it took from an
opponent’s move during the turn this move is used.

moves.name: Aqua Cutter
moves.description: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

moves.name: Matcha Gotcha
moves.description:
Has a 20% chance of burning targets. The user’s HP is restored
by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Syrup Bomb
moves.description: Gives the target the Syrupy status for 3 turns.

moves.name: Electro Shot
moves.description:
The user gains the Charging status on the turn this move is used,
then attacks on the following turn. In rain, the user does not
gain the Charging status and can attack immediately. The user’s
Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 1 stage on the turn this move is used.

moves.name: Fickle Beam
moves.description: This move has a 30% chance of its power being doubled.

moves.name: Hard Press
moves.description:
The more HP the target has left, the greater this move’s power
(ranging between 1 and 100).

moves.name: Dragon Cheer
moves.description:
Gives allies a Critical-Hit Ratio Boost. Dragon types receive a
2-stage boost. All other types receive a 1-stage boost.

moves.name: Alluring Voice
moves.description:
Confuses the target if its stats were boosted during the turn this
move is used.

moves.name: Temper Flare
moves.description:
This move’s power is doubled if the user couldn’t act or its move
missed or failed on the previous turn.

moves.name: Supercell Slam
moves.description:
If this move misses or fails, the user takes damage equal to 1/2
of its max HP. If the target has the Minimized status, this move’s
power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.

moves.name: Psychic Noise
moves.description: Gives the target the Healing Prevented status for 2 turns.

moves.name: Upper Hand
moves.description:
Makes the target flinch. This move fails if the target isn’t about
to use a priority move.

abilities.name: Stench
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon deals damage with its moves, there is a
10% chance that targets will flinch.

abilities.name: Drizzle
abilities.description: Summons rain for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

abilities.name: Speed Boost
abilities.description:
Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat by 1 stage at the end of
every turn.

abilities.name: Battle Armor
abilities.description: Attacks landed on the Pokémon will never be critical hits.

abilities.name: Sturdy
abilities.description:
If the Pokémon has full HP and takes damage from a move that
would knock it out in one hit, it will endure the hit with 1 HP.
The Pokémon is also immune to one-hit KO moves.

abilities.name: Damp
abilities.description:
All Pokémon become unable to use explosive moves.
Explosive Abilities also fail to trigger.

abilities.name: Limber
abilities.description: The Pokémon cannot be paralyzed.

abilities.name: Sand Veil
abilities.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s evasiveness by 25% in a sandstorm.

abilities.name: Static
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a
30% chance of being paralyzed.

abilities.name: Volt Absorb
abilities.description:
Electric-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they
restore 1/4 of its max HP.

abilities.name: Water Absorb
abilities.description:
Water-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they
restore 1/4 of its max HP.

abilities.name: Oblivious
abilities.description:
The Pokémon cannot gain the Infatuated or Taunted statuses
and is unaffected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Cloud Nine
abilities.description: Eliminates the effects of weather.

abilities.name: Compound Eyes
abilities.description: Boosts the accuracy of the Pokémon’s moves by 30%.

abilities.name: Insomnia
abilities.description: The Pokémon cannot become drowsy or be put to sleep.

abilities.name: Immunity

abilities.name: Flash Fire

Fire-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they
give the Pokémon the Flash Fire status.

abilities.name: Shield Dust
abilities.description: The Pokémon is immune to additional effects from attacks.

abilities.name: Own Tempo
abilities.description:
The Pokémon cannot become confused and is unaffected by
Intimidate.

abilities.name: Suction Cups
abilities.description:
The Pokémon is unaffected by the moves and held items of
other Pokémon that would force it to switch out of battle.

abilities.name: Intimidate

When the Pokémon enters a battle, it lowers the Attack stats of
opponents by 1 stage.

abilities.name: Shadow Tag
abilities.description: Opponents cannot be switched out of battle.

abilities.name: Rough Skin
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker takes
damage equal to 1/8 of its max HP.

abilities.name: Levitate
abilities.description:
The Pokémon floats off the ground, making it immune to
Ground-type moves, as well as the Spikes, Toxic Spikes,
and Sticky Web statuses.

abilities.name: Effect Spore
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a
30% chance of being poisoned, paralyzed, or put to sleep.

abilities.name: Synchronize
abilities.description:
If the Pokémon is burned, paralyzed, poisoned, or badly
poisoned by another Pokémon’s move or Ability, that Pokémon
will also be inflicted with the same status condition.

abilities.name: Clear Body
abilities.description:
The Pokémon’s stats cannot be lowered by other Pokémon’s
moves or Abilities.

abilities.name: Natural Cure
abilities.description:
The Pokémon’s status conditions are cured when it switches out
of battle.

abilities.name: Lightning Rod
abilities.description:
The Pokémon draws in all Electric-type moves. These moves do
not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they boost its Sp. Atk stat by
1 stage.

abilities.name: Swift Swim
abilities.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in rain.

abilities.name: Chlorophyll
abilities.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in harsh sunlight.

abilities.name: Illuminate
abilities.description:
The Pokémon ignores changes to targets’ evasiveness and its
accuracy cannot be lowered.

abilities.name: Trace
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it changes its Ability to
match that of an opponent.

abilities.name: Huge Power

abilities.name: Poison Point
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a
30% chance of being poisoned.

abilities.name: Inner Focus

The Pokémon never flinches when attacked and is unaffected
by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Magma Armor
abilities.description: The Pokémon cannot be frozen.

abilities.name: Soundproof
abilities.description: The Pokémon is immune to sound-based moves.

abilities.name: Rain Dish
abilities.description:
The Pokémon has 1/16 of its max HP restored at the end of
every turn in rain.

abilities.name: Sand Stream

Summons a sandstorm for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters
a battle.

abilities.name: Pressure

against the Pokémon.

abilities.name: Thick Fat

Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire- and Ice-type
moves.

abilities.name: Early Bird

The Pokémon awakens from sleep twice as fast as other
Pokémon.

abilities.name: Flame Body
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a
30% chance of being burned.

abilities.name: Keen Eye
abilities.description:
The Pokémon ignores changes to targets’ evasiveness and its
accuracy cannot be lowered.

abilities.name: Hyper Cutter
abilities.description:
The Pokémon’s Attack stat cannot be lowered by other
Pokémon’s moves or Abilities.

abilities.name: Pickup

If the Pokémon is not already holding an item, at the end of
the turn it will pick up an item that was consumed by another
Pokémon.

abilities.name: Hustle
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon uses physical moves, its Attack stat is
boosted by 50%, but its accuracy is lowered by 20%.

abilities.name: Cute Charm

When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has
a 30% chance of gaining the Infatuated status if the attacker
and the Pokémon are of opposite genders.

abilities.name: Plus

Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat by 50% if an ally with the

abilities.name: Minus
abilities.description:
Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat by 50% if an ally with the
Plus or Minus Ability is also in battle.

abilities.name: Forecast
abilities.description:
The Pokémon transforms with the weather to change its type to
Water, Fire, or Ice.

abilities.name: Sticky Hold
abilities.description:
The Pokémon’s held item cannot be stolen or removed by other
Pokémon.

abilities.name: Shed Skin
abilities.description:
The Pokémon has a 30% chance of curing its own status
conditions at the end of every turn.

abilities.name: Guts
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon has a status condition, its Attack stat is
boosted by 50%. Being burned does not halve the damage
dealt by the Pokémon’s physical moves.

abilities.name: Marvel Scale
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon has a status condition, its Defense stat is
boosted by 50%.

abilities.name: Overgrow
abilities.description:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Grass-type moves by 50%
when its HP drops to 1/3 or less of its max.

abilities.name: Blaze
abilities.description:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Fire-type moves by 50%
when its HP drops to 1/3 or less of its max.

abilities.name: Torrent
abilities.description:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Water-type moves by 50%
when its HP drops to 1/3 or less of its max.

abilities.name: Swarm

Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Bug-type moves by 50%
when its HP drops to 1/3 or less of its max.

abilities.name: Rock Head

The Pokémon will not lose HP due to recoil damage from
its moves.

abilities.name: Drought

Summons harsh sunlight for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters
a battle.

abilities.name: Vital Spirit
abilities.description: The Pokémon cannot become drowsy or be put to sleep.

abilities.name: White Smoke
abilities.description:
The Pokémon’s stats cannot be lowered by other Pokémon’s
moves or Abilities.

abilities.name: Pure Power
abilities.description: Doubles the power of the Pokémon’s physical moves.

abilities.name: Shell Armor
abilities.description: Attacks landed on the Pokémon will never be critical hits.

abilities.name: Tangled Feet

Electric-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they

abilities.name: Rivalry

Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 25% against
targets of the same gender, and lowers it by 25% against targets
of the opposite gender. The power remains the same as usual if
either Pokémon’s gender is unknown.

abilities.name: Steadfast
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon flinches, its Speed stat is boosted by
1 stage.

abilities.name: Snow Cloak
abilities.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s evasiveness by 25% in snow.

abilities.name: Gluttony
abilities.description:
If the Pokémon is holding a Berry to be eaten when its HP drops
to 1/4 or less of its max, it will instead eat the Berry when its HP
drops to 1/2 or less of its max.

abilities.name: Anger Point
abilities.description:
Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat to its sixth stage when the
Pokémon takes a critical hit.

abilities.name: Unburden
abilities.description:
Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat when its held item is
consumed or lost.

abilities.name: Heatproof
abilities.description:
Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire-type moves
and from being burned.

abilities.name: Simple
abilities.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s stat changes.

abilities.name: Dry Skin
abilities.description:
Water-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they
restore 1/4 of its max HP. However, the Pokémon takes 25%
more damage from Fire-type moves. The Pokémon has 1/8 of
its max HP restored at the end of every turn in rain, but it loses
1/8 of its max HP at the end of every turn in harsh sunlight.

abilities.name: Iron Fist
abilities.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s punching moves by 20%.

abilities.name: Poison Heal
abilities.description:
If poisoned or badly poisoned, the Pokémon has 1/8 of its max
HP restored at the end of every turn instead of losing HP.

abilities.name: Adaptability
abilities.description:
Boosts the power of moves of the same type as the Pokémon by
100% instead of 50%.

abilities.name: Skill Link
abilities.description:
The Pokémon’s multistrike moves always hit the maximum
number of times.

abilities.name: Hydration
abilities.description:
Cures the Pokémon’s status conditions at the end of every
turn in rain.

abilities.name: Solar Power
abilities.description:
In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 50%,
but it loses 1/8 of its max HP at the end of every turn.

abilities.name: Quick Feet
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon has a status condition, its Speed stat is
boosted by 50%. Being paralyzed does not lower the
Pokémon’s Speed stat.

abilities.name: Sniper
abilities.description:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s critical hits by 125%
instead of 50%.

abilities.name: Magic Guard
abilities.description: The Pokémon takes damage only from attacks.

abilities.name: No Guard
abilities.description:
The accuracy of moves used both by and against the Pokémon
becomes 100%.

abilities.name: Stall
abilities.description: The Pokémon’s moves go last among moves of the same priority.

abilities.name: Technician
abilities.description:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 50% if their
power is 60 or less.

abilities.name: Leaf Guard
abilities.description: The Pokémon is immune to status conditions in harsh sunlight.

abilities.name: Klutz
abilities.description: Items do not work when held by the Pokémon.

abilities.name: Mold Breaker
abilities.description:
The Pokémon’s moves are unaffected by the Ability of the
target (with certain exceptions).

abilities.name: Super Luck
abilities.description: The Pokémon has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

abilities.name: Aftermath
abilities.description:
Attackers that knock out the Pokémon with a contact move take
damage equal to 1/4 of their max HP.

abilities.name: Anticipation
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it senses whether the
opponents know any one-hit KO moves or moves that are super
effective against it.

abilities.name: Forewarn
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it identifies the move with
the highest power among all the moves the opponents know.

abilities.name: Unaware
abilities.description:
The Pokémon ignores the target’s stat changes when attacking,
and ignores the attacker’s stat changes when being attacked.
It cannot ignore changes to the Speed stat, however.

abilities.name: Filter
abilities.description:
Reduces the damage the Pokémon takes from supereffective
moves by 25%.

abilities.name: Scrappy
abilities.description:
The Pokémon can hit Ghost types with Normal- and
Fighting-type moves. It is also unaffected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Ice Body
abilities.description:
The Pokémon has 1/16 of its max HP restored at the end of
every turn in snow.

abilities.name: Solid Rock
abilities.description:
Reduces the damage the Pokémon takes from supereffective
moves by 25%.

abilities.name: Snow Warning
abilities.description: Summons snow for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

abilities.name: Frisk
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it identifies opponents’
held items.

abilities.name: Reckless
abilities.description:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 20% if they have
recoil or crash damage.

abilities.name: Pickpocket
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, it will steal the
held item of the attacker if it is not already holding an item.

abilities.name: Sheer Force
abilities.description:
The Pokémon’s moves lose their additional effects, but the
power of those moves will be boosted by 30%.

abilities.name: Contrary
abilities.description:
Reverses any stat changes affecting the Pokémon so that
attempts to boost its stats instead lower them—and attempts
to lower its stats will boost them.

abilities.name: Unnerve
abilities.description: Makes opponents unable to eat Berries.

abilities.name: Defiant
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon has any of its stats lowered by an opponent,
its Attack stat is boosted by 2 stages.

abilities.name: Cursed Body
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, the attacker has
a 30% chance of gaining the Move Disabled status for 4 turns.

abilities.name: Healer
abilities.description:
The Pokémon has a 50% chance of curing the status conditions
of its allies at the end of every turn.

abilities.name: Friend Guard
abilities.description: Reduces the damage allies take by 25%.

abilities.name: Weak Armor
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a physical move, its
Defense stat is lowered by 1 stage, but its Speed stat is boosted
by 2 stages.

abilities.name: Heavy Metal
abilities.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s weight.

abilities.name: Light Metal
abilities.description: Halves the Pokémon’s weight.

abilities.name: Multiscale
abilities.description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes while its HP is full.

abilities.name: Harvest
abilities.description:
If the Pokémon has used a Berry, it has a 50% chance of creating
another one at the end of every turn. In harsh sunlight, the
Pokémon will definitely create a Berry.

abilities.name: Telepathy
abilities.description: The Pokémon dodges attacks from its allies.

abilities.name: Moody
abilities.description:
At the end of every turn, one of the Pokémon’s stats will be
boosted by 2 stages, but another will be lowered by 1 stage.

abilities.name: Overcoat
abilities.description:
The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms and is immune
to moves and Abilities involving powder.

abilities.name: Poison Touch
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon hits a target with a contact move, the target
has a 30% chance of being poisoned.

abilities.name: Regenerator
abilities.description:
The Pokémon has 1/3 of its max HP restored when it switches
out of battle.

abilities.name: Big Pecks
abilities.description:
The Pokémon’s Defense stat cannot be lowered by other
Pokémon’s moves or Abilities.

abilities.name: Sand Rush
abilities.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in a sandstorm.

abilities.name: Analytic
abilities.description:
Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 30% when the
Pokémon is the last to move that turn.

abilities.name: Illusion

The Pokémon enters battle disguised as the last Pokémon in its
party. It reverts to its usual appearance when it takes damage
from a move.

copies all of that Pokémon’s stats apart from its HP.

abilities.name: Infiltrator

When using its moves, the Pokémon ignores the effects of
targets’ Light Screen, Reflect, Aurora Veil, Safeguard, and
substitutes.

abilities.name: Mummy
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has its
Ability changed to Mummy.

abilities.name: Moxie
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon knocks out a target with an attack, its
Attack stat is boosted by 1 stage.

abilities.name: Justified
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a Dark-type move, its
Attack stat is boosted by 1 stage.

abilities.name: Magic Bounce
abilities.description:
Instead of being affected by other Pokémon’s status moves,
the Pokémon bounces them back at the user.

abilities.name: Sap Sipper

boost its Attack stat by 1 stage.

abilities.name: Prankster

abilities.name: Sand Force

abilities.name: Flower Veil

Grass-type allies are immune to status conditions and cannot

abilities.name: Cheek Pouch
abilities.description:
The Pokémon has 1/3 of its max HP restored when it eats a
Berry, in addition to the Berry’s usual effect.

abilities.name: Protean

about to use. This works only once per time the Pokémon
enters battle.

abilities.name: Fur Coat

abilities.name: Magician

held item from targets it deals damage to with its moves.

abilities.name: Bulletproof

abilities.name: Competitive

abilities.name: Sweet Veil

abilities.name: Stance Change

and changes into its Shield Forme when it uses the move
King’s Shield.

abilities.name: Gale Wings

1 stage while its HP is full.

abilities.name: Mega Launcher
abilities.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s pulse moves by 50%.

abilities.name: Symbiosis
abilities.description:

item to that ally.

abilities.name: Tough Claws

abilities.name: Pixilate
abilities.description:
The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves
and their power is boosted by 20%.

abilities.name: Gooey
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker’s
Speed stat is lowered by 1 stage.

abilities.name: Aerilate

abilities.name: Parental Bond

the child’s attacks is 1/4 of those of the parent.

abilities.name: Fairy Aura

abilities.name: Stamina

When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, its Defense stat
is boosted by 1 stage.

abilities.name: Merciless
abilities.description:
The Pokémon’s attacks become critical hits if the target is
poisoned or badly poisoned.

abilities.name: Water Bubble
abilities.description:
Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire-type moves
and doubles the power of its Water-type moves. The Pokémon
cannot be burned.

abilities.name: Berserk
abilities.description:
Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage when an attack
causes its HP to drop to 1/2 or less of its max.

abilities.name: Slush Rush
abilities.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in snow.

abilities.name: Long Reach
abilities.description:
None of the moves used by the Pokémon are considered
contact moves.

abilities.name: Liquid Voice
abilities.description: The Pokémon’s sound-based moves become Water-type moves.

abilities.name: Surge Surfer
abilities.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat on Electric Terrain.

abilities.name: Disguise

When the Pokémon is in its Disguised Form and would take
damage from a move, it loses 1/8 of its max HP instead of
taking the damage, then changes into its Busted Form.

abilities.name: Corrosion
abilities.description:
The Pokémon can poison or badly poison targets even if they’re
Steel or Poison types.

abilities.name: Queenly Majesty
abilities.description:
Opponents are unable to use priority moves against the
Pokémon or its allies.

abilities.name: Innards Out
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a move that knocks it
out, it deals the same amount of damage to the attacker.

abilities.name: Fluffy
abilities.description:
Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from contact moves, but
doubles the damage taken from Fire-type moves.

abilities.name: Tangling Hair
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker’s
Speed stat is lowered by 1 stage.

abilities.name: Receiver
abilities.description:
The Pokémon changes its Ability to match that of a
defeated ally.

abilities.name: Electric Surge
abilities.description:
Turns the entire field into Electric Terrain for 5 turns when the
Pokémon enters a battle.

abilities.name: Mirror Armor
abilities.description:
Instead of being affected by stat-lowering effects, the Pokémon
bounces them back at whichever Pokémon caused them.

abilities.name: Stalwart
abilities.description:
The Pokémon ignores the effects of Abilities and moves that
draw in moves.

abilities.name: Sand Spit
abilities.description:
Summons a sandstorm for 5 turns when the Pokémon takes
damage from moves.

abilities.name: Ripen
abilities.description: Doubles the effects of Berries eaten by the Pokémon.

abilities.name: Mimicry
abilities.description: The Pokémon’s type changes depending on the terrain.

abilities.name: Screen Cleaner
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it removes the Light Screen,
Reflect, and Aurora Veil statuses.

abilities.name: Wandering Spirit
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, it swaps Abilities
with the attacker.

abilities.name: Hunger Switch
abilities.description:
The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly
Mode and Hangry Mode at the end of every turn.

abilities.name: Quick Draw
abilities.description:
The Pokémon’s moves have a 30% chance of going first among
moves of the same priority.

abilities.name: Unseen Fist
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets
that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that
the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the
target’s protective effects is still triggered.

abilities.name: Curious Medicine
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it removes all stat changes
from its allies.

abilities.name: Purifying Salt
abilities.description:
Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Ghost-type moves.
The Pokémon is immune to status conditions.

abilities.name: Zero to Hero
abilities.description:
The Pokémon changes into its Hero Form when it switches out
of battle.

abilities.name: Electromorphosis
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it gains the
Electric Boost status.

abilities.name: Good as Gold
abilities.description: The Pokémon is immune to status moves used by other Pokémon.

abilities.name: Opportunist
abilities.description:
When an opponent’s stats are boosted, the Pokémon boosts its
own stats in the exact same way.

abilities.name: Cud Chew
abilities.description:
If the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will eat that same Berry once
more at the end of the next turn.

abilities.name: Sharpness
abilities.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s slicing moves by 50%.

abilities.name: Supreme Overlord
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, the power of its moves is
boosted by 10% for each Pokémon in its party that has been
defeated in the battle already. The maximum boost is 50%.

abilities.name: Toxic Debris
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a physical move, it
gives the opponent’s side the Toxic Spikes status.

abilities.name: Armor Tail
abilities.description:
Opponents are unable to use priority moves against the
Pokémon or its allies.

abilities.name: Earth Eater
abilities.description:
Ground-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they
restore 1/4 of its max HP.

abilities.name: Hospitality
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it restores 1/4 of its ally’s
max HP.

abilities.name: Supersweet Syrup
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon enters a battle, opponents’ evasiveness is
lowered by 1 stage. This Ability is triggered only once per battle.

abilities.name: Piercing Drill
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets
that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that
the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the
target’s protective effects is still triggered.

abilities.name: Dragonize
abilities.description:
The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves
and their power is boosted by 20%.

abilities.name: Eelevate
abilities.description:
The Pokémon floats off the ground, making it immune to
Ground-type moves, as well as the Spikes, Toxic Spikes,
and Sticky Web statuses. When the Pokémon knocks out a
target with an attack, its highest stat is boosted by 1 stage.

abilities.name: Mega Sol
abilities.description:
Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can
use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.

abilities.name: Fire Mane
abilities.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Fire-type moves by 50%.

abilities.name: Spicy Spray
abilities.description:
When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns
the attacker.
